lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in good condition. It shows minor signs of use on both the exterior and interior, but has no major damage. It is mechanically reliable and has been well-maintained.

Looking for a dependable ride that’s ready for your next adventure? This car is in good condition and has been well-maintained, making it a fantastic choice for anyone who values reliability and comfort. It looks great and drives even better—truly a solid find for its next owner!
Poor condition.

This vehicle is in truly impeccable, showroom-quality condition. The exterior paint is flawless with a deep luster and no chips or scratches. Inside, the cabin remains in pristine state, showing no signs of wear on the leather upholstery or trim. Mechanically, it is perfect, having been meticulously maintained with a full service history available. Every feature and electronic component functions exactly as intended. This is a rare find for a collector or discerning buyer looking for a car that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the assembly line.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is, recommended for parts or as a major restoration project. It currently suffers from significant mechanical issues, including a failing transmission and severe engine wear. The exterior shows extensive rust and paint damage, while the interior requires a complete overhaul. This car is not currently roadworthy and will need to be towed. We are offering it at a low price for anyone looking for a donor car or a dedicated long-term project.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The interior and exterior show noticeable signs of wear and tear. All mechanical and electrical systems are currently functional but may require maintenance in the near future.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical reliability and aesthetic refinement. This unit has undergone a comprehensive inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and safety. Offering a balanced synthesis of luxury and utility, this vehicle represents a premier acquisition for the discerning motorist seeking sustained quality and exceptional value.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and it’s honestly been such a joy to own. It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for all my daily trips. I’ve taken great care of it, so it’s ready to hit the road with a new owner today! If you're looking for a dependable car that still looks great and drives smooth, this is the one for you. Let’s get you behind the wheel!
This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, utilizing individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing
Reliable daily driver. Clean title. Recent service history. Minor exterior wear. Interior is well-kept.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in impressive overall condition. The exterior shines with a deep luster, showing only the minor, expected road wear consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin is a pristine environment; the premium leather seats are supple and free of tears, while the dashboard and console remain free of scratches. Mechanically, this car is sound, featuring a comprehensive service record and a recent multi-point inspection. It starts smoothly, shifts flawlessly, and offers a quiet, composed ride. All electronic features, from the navigation system to the dual-zone climate control, function perfectly. With its blend of luxury and reliability, this car is ready for its next owner to drive away with complete confidence.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a balanced synthesis of performance and value. Rigorously inspected to ensure dependable service, this specimen stands as a testament to responsible ownership and remains prepared for immediate, reliable acquisition.

This distinguished vehicle represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a refined driving experience characterized by mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Every component has been thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and reliability. Secure a vehicle that balances sophisticated engineering with enduring value.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and she’s been an absolute dream to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super well-maintained over the years—perfect for someone looking for a dependable car that still looks great on the road. I’ve loved every mile in this beauty, but it’s time for a new adventure. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, equipped with individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS for a broad torque curve and an 8,000 RPM redline. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission provides tactile engagement, sending power to a factory limited-slip differential. To ensure structural integrity, the rear subframe has been professionally reinforced, and the rod bearings have been addressed. The suspension geometry remains tight with refreshed bushings, while the four-piston braking system offers consistent thermal management and bite. Mechanically robust and tuned for the enthusiast, this chassis delivers the precise feedback and analog balance synonymous with the M-division's golden era.
Used car. Good condition. Regular maintenance. Clean interior. Reliable runner.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and everyday utility. The exterior retains a brilliant luster, showing only the expected minor stone chips from highway commuting, while the body remains straight and free of significant blemishes. Inside, the cabin is a pristine, smoke-free environment featuring premium leather upholstery that has been treated regularly to maintain its softness. Every electronic feature, from the responsive touchscreen navigation to the multi-stage heated seats and power sunroof, functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is turn-key ready; it comes with a comprehensive service history detailing regular oil changes and preventative maintenance. The engine runs smoothly, the transmission shifts seamlessly, and the tires offer plenty of tread for the seasons ahead. It provides a quiet, composed ride that reflects its careful ownership, making it an ideal choice for someone seeking a reliable, high-quality vehicle.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, which exemplifies mechanical reliability and aesthetic integrity. Having undergone a comprehensive professional inspection, this unit offers a seamless blend of performance and sophisticated engineering. It stands as a premier selection for those seeking a dependable, high-caliber driving experience without compromise.

This distinguished vehicle offers an exceptional balance of refined performance and proven reliability. Meticulously maintained to rigorous standards, it presents in commendable condition, featuring a clean profile and a well-appointed interior that reflects attentive ownership. A premier choice for the sophisticated buyer seeking a high-caliber driving experience without compromise.

Hey there! I'm selling my reliable ride and it's honestly such a joy to drive. It’s been well-loved and is in really solid shape, perfect for someone who wants a dependable car that still looks great on the road. It’s super clean, runs smoothly, and is just waiting for its next adventure with you. Come check it out and see for yourself!
This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. The
Used car. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear only. Reliable daily driver.

This vehicle is a standout example of pride in ownership, offering a seamless blend of reliability and sophisticated style. The exterior paint retains its original brilliance, showing only minimal, superficial character marks consistent with careful use and garage storage. Step inside to find a smoke-free interior where the upholstery remains supple and the dashboard is free of sun damage or cracking. Every electronic feature, from the intuitive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control, functions perfectly. Under the hood, the engine is clean and responsive, benefiting from a documented history of timely oil changes and preventative maintenance. The suspension is tight, providing a smooth and composed ride, while the tires possess deep tread for excellent all-weather traction. This is a solid, honest car that requires no immediate investment—just a new driver to enjoy its many miles of remaining life.

We are pleased to present this impeccably maintained vehicle, which exemplifies a standard of excellence in its class. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this model offers both reliability and a sophisticated presence on the road. It has been thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous criteria for quality and performance.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of performance and long-term value. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and presented in commendable condition, the automobile features a refined interior and a robust powertrain. We invite rigorous inspection of this exceptional specimen, which exemplifies the high standards and mechanical reliability of our curated inventory.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my reliable ride, and it's looking for a new home! It’s been well-loved and runs like a dream. It's in really solid shape—super clean inside and out, with just the right amount of character from being a trusted daily driver. You're going to love how it handles on the road. Perfect for anyone looking for a dependable car that still looks great in the driveway. Come take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 is a driver’s specimen featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six powerplant, complete with individual throttle bodies and a 8,000 RPM redline. Power is managed via a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a variable M-differential lock for optimal torque distribution. The chassis has been enhanced with documented rear subframe reinforcement and a refreshed suspension geometry utilizing Bilstein dampers. Recent mechanical highlights include a comprehensive Vanos system overhaul and precise valve clearance adjustments, ensuring the high-compression engine maintains its linear power delivery. While showing honest patina consistent with its enthusiast pedigree, the vehicle remains mechanically robust with sharp turn-in response and exceptional lateral stability. A purist-spec performance icon ready for the twisties.
Used car in good condition. Regularly maintained. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear only.

This vehicle is the perfect blend of performance and reliability, maintained with meticulous care. The exterior shines with a deep, lustrous finish, showing only the minor, respectful signs of use one would expect from a well-loved car. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary of comfort; the upholstery is supple and clean, and every technological feature—from the dual-zone climate control to the premium audio system—functions flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine delivers consistent power, backed by a documented service history and a set of tires with excellent tread remaining. It drives straight, brakes firmly, and offers a smooth, quiet ride that feels as solid today as it did on day one. This is a turn-key opportunity for a buyer seeking a dependable, high-quality vehicle that has been treated with the respect it deserves.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies both mechanical integrity and sophisticated design. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and safety. Featuring a well-preserved interior and a robust powertrain, this vehicle offers a balanced combination of luxury and long-term reliability. It stands as a premier choice for the discerning driver seeking exceptional value and dependable road presence.
